flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Western Piedmont Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (11.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Western Piedmont Community College rose 29% between 2021 and 2024 (58.1% → 75.2%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Western Piedmont Community College rose 26% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1k → 1.3k).
